refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness for operational use by minimizing data acquisition latency and processing latency.
refined_fr.rationale: To meet the overall latency requirement, the update process is decomposed into two key sub-functions: acquiring timely data from the worksite and processing that data efficiently to update the model.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure and verify the latency of data acquisition and processing separately, then confirm the combined update latency meets the p95 ≤ 1.0 s target under supported scenarios.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process acquired data to update the worksite model within latency constraints

candidate_dps: DP1: Use high-bandwidth, low-latency telemetry links for data acquisition
DP2: Implement real-time data processing algorithms optimized for low latency
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address acquisition and processing latency

potential_sources: Data acquisition and processing are sequential but modular functions
Interfaces between telemetry and processing modules are well-defined
coupling_check.notes: The two DPs map cleanly to the two sub-FRs with minimal coupling; changes in one DP have limited impact on the other.

assumptions_risks: Assumes telemetry infrastructure supports required bandwidth and latency
Processing algorithms can be optimized without compromising accuracy
Risk of network congestion impacting telemetry latency
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor telemetry network performance and processing load to ensure latency targets are consistently met.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating telemetry data acquisition and real-time processing to update the worksite model

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time sensor and vehicle data from the Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data transmission between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module containing both data acquisition and processing DPs; minimal diffusion as functionality is centralized.
Provides raw data but does not perform update processing; limited containment.
May generate telemetry data but not responsible for model update.
No direct role in worksite model update latency.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the update latency functionality within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves latency control.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded
Dependency on network link quality may affect latency
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider load balancing or modularizing processing within NGHE Solution if latency targets are not met.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs map clearly to selected DPs with low coupling and well-defined interfaces.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing processing in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion risk
Network link dependency remains a risk for latency
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Latency can be measured end-to-end and at sub-function levels within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of acquisition and processing to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Plan for scalability within NGHE Solution to handle processing load

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with clear ownership and manageable risks. Verification approaches are feasible.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process acquired data to update the worksite model within latency constraints

revise.why: Current level is sound; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Processing algorithms can be optimized for real-time performance
open_risks: Processing load causing delays in update
evidence_needed: Latency measurements of telemetry under operational conditions
